paper_title: A sublimation technique for high-precision measurements of δ 13 CO 2 and mixing ratios of CO 2 and N 2 O from air trapped in ice cores

methods.description: This method describes the measurement scheme using Cracker-GC-IRMS for high-precision δ 13 C and mixing ratio measurements of CO 2 and N 2 O from ice core samples. It involves the use of referencing peaks and correction for δ 13 C drift and linearity.

steps.description: Gas is admitted to the ion source by identically crimped capillaries.
steps.searchable_summary: admit gas to ion source using crimped capillaries

steps.description: Bracket a sample peak with two references and try to adjust their signal heights as precisely as possible.
steps.searchable_summary: adjust signal heights of sample and reference peaks

steps.description: Correct data using empirical functions for the amount dependency in δ 13 C.
steps.searchable_summary: apply empirical correction for δ 13 C amount dependency

steps.description: Extract air from several ice core samples and store the CO 2 in glass tubes until they are all measured in a single run.
steps.searchable_summary: extract and store CO 2 from ice core samples

steps.description: Start a measurement session with a 'linearity section' consisting of pairs of an 'equilibration peak' (EQ) followed by a 'linearity peak'.
steps.searchable_summary: initiate measurement session with linearity section

methods.description: This method evaluates the precision and reproducibility of δ 13 C and mixing ratio measurements for CO 2 and N 2 O using the Cracker-GC-IRMS system, focusing on the variability and potential sources of error.

steps.description: Discuss the measurement precision of the system, starting with the CO 2 /N 2 O pulses admitted to the cracker-GC-IRMS.
steps.searchable_summary: evaluate precision of CO 2 /N 2 O pulses in cracker-GC-IRMS

steps.description: Compare the precision of air reference gases processed with the sublimation system to that of the CO 2 /N 2 O pulses.
steps.searchable_summary: compare precision of air reference gases and CO 2 /N 2 O pulses

steps.description: Measure several samples from different ice cores at different depth intervals in replicate.
steps.searchable_summary: measure ice core samples at different depths in replicate

steps.description: Evaluate the precision for the mixing ratios for the air references and the ice cores.
steps.searchable_summary: evaluate precision of mixing ratios for air references and ice cores

steps.description: Discuss potential sources of error and variability in the ice core samples.
steps.searchable_summary: identify sources of error and variability in ice core samples
